c.d: Total number of active monthly users on the platform, indicating market reach and potential buyer pool
c.s: App store analytics, company reports, market research firms

c.d: Percentage of listed items that successfully sell within 30 days, indicating platform effectiveness
c.s: Platform statistics, user surveys, third-party marketplace analysis

c.d: Percentage of sale price taken by the platform as fees, affecting seller profitability
c.s: Platform fee schedules, terms of service, seller documentation

c.d: Number of distinct product categories supported for listing, indicating versatility
c.s: Platform category listings, app features, seller guidelines

c.d: Composite score based on buyer protection, secure payments, identity verification, and dispute resolution capabilities
c.s: Platform security policies, user safety features, payment protection terms
